answer:
To find the ratio of the investment prior to sale to the pre-tax gain on the sale, divide the book value of the investment by the pre-tax gain:

\[
\text{Ratio} = \frac{\text{Book Value}}{\text{Pre-tax Gain}} = \frac{246}{171}
\]

Simplifying the ratio:

\[
\boxed{\frac{246}{171} \approx 1.44}
\]
